name: GeyserMC
description: GeyserMC is used to allow Bedrock Edition to join your Java Server.
full_description:
GeyserMC permite jogadores Bedrock entrarem no seu servidor Java.

Escolha o tipo (Spigot, Velocity ou BungeeCord), a porta Bedrock e se deseja incluir o Floodgate.
author: BluePrint

variables.name: Bedrock Port
variables.description: The Port to use for Bedrock Connectivity, make sure the port has been assigned in your Network Tab.

variables.name: GeyserMC Type
variables.description: What type of the GeyserMC Plugin to use.

variables.name: Include Floodgate
variables.description: Include floodgate in the GeyserMC Installation, this is required for bedrock players to join without logging in with a java account.

steps.content:
# Gerado pelo Template Installer
bedrock:
  port: {{ $bedrock_port }}
  clone-remote-port: false
remote:
  address: 127.0.0.1
  port: {{ $server['allocation']['port'] }}
  auth-type: floodgate
